free_text: High-resolution 96Zr(3He,t) experiment and the matrix
element for double-beta decay
Institut fuer Kernphysik
Research Center for Electron and Photon
Science
Department of Physics
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
Nuclear Physics
Department of Physics
Gifu University, Yanagido, Gifu 501-1193
Center for Fundamental Research and
Calculation
Center for Nuclear Study
Department of Physics, Mandalay University,
Mandalay 05092
CYRIC
National Superconducting Cyclotron
Laboratory, The Joint Institute for Nuclear
Astrophysics and the Department of Physics
and Astronomy
Charge of incident ion is +2.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 0.99 mg/cm2.
- Target is self supported.
AVF cyclotron at Research Center for
Nuclear Physics
Ring cyclotron at Research Center for
Nuclear Physics
- Solid angle: +-20 mrad in horizontal and +-40 mrad
in vertical direction for Grand Raiden.
- Calibration: In the excitation energy region of less
than 3 MeV and above 3 MeV, the precision of the
calibration is 1 keV and 5 keV in final 96Nb
spectra, respectively.
Grand Raiden magnetic spectrometer to analyze
outgoing triton.
MWDCs for reconstructing the particle
trajectories and plastic scintillators for
providing trigger signals and fro particle
identification.
DWBA (Distorted wave Born approximation) (with
the reaction codes NORMOD and FOLD)
Ichiko
ANG-CM is polar angle (c.m.) between beam and triton
